description.en: Insert one or more rows into a Supabase table.
description.de: Eine oder mehrere Zeilen in eine Supabase-Tabelle einfügen.
description.es: Insert one or more rows into a Supabase table.
description.fr: Insert one or more rows into a Supabase table.
description.ro: Insert one or more rows into a Supabase table.
description.it: Insert one or more rows into a Supabase table.

vars.SUPABASE_KEY: env:SUPABASE_KEY|Your Supabase anon or service_role key from Project Settings > API.

inputs.name: Table

description.en: The table name to insert into.
description.es: The table name to insert into.
description.fr: The table name to insert into.
description.ro: The table name to insert into.
description.it: The table name to insert into.

inputs.bot: The name of the Supabase/PostgreSQL table.

description.en: JSON object or array of objects to insert.
description.es: JSON object or array of objects to insert.
description.fr: JSON object or array of objects to insert.
description.ro: JSON object or array of objects to insert.
description.it: JSON object or array of objects to insert.

inputs.bot: JSON object for single row or array of objects for multiple rows. Example: {"name": "John", "email": "john@example.com"} or [{...}, {...}]
